g.text: Soroban Contracts (attr + rfq on Mainnet, audited · vault = testnet PoC)

div.p: BACEN FX-licensed BR anchor (10-candidate pool · offshore fallback) upstream SEP-31 + SEP-38 PIX BRL rail
Fireblocks (mainnet) / self-custody (testnet) external signer
Card Processor / Issuer / BIN Visa · Mastercard rails Monavate-pattern EMI (offchain; not on Stellar) (card PoC only)
OpenZeppelin Stellar Contracts stellar-contracts =0.7.1 (MIT) build-time dependency
Partner-Attribution Wrapper Mainnet · audited composes OZ stellar_tokens::fungible::sac_admin_wrapper
SEP-38 Rate-Lock Mainnet · audited custom Soroban Temporary storage (CAP-46-12) reuses OZ stellar_fee_abstraction::validate_expiration_ledger (quote_use, quote_id, context, sep31_tx_id) events
Card-Collateral Vault (TESTNET PoC — off critical path) composes OZ stellar_contract_utils::pausable

ul.li: stellar_access::access_control admin-gated reserve / settle / release (production vault adds OZ smart_account::SmartAccount + policies::spending_limit + verifiers::webauthn / ed25519) USDC yield only (never XLM)

div.p: USDC SAC Circle · CAP-46-06 AUTH_CLAWBACK_ENABLED
API Gateway Kong · TLS · rate-limit
Enterprise Dashboard React + Vite
Partner Console React + Vite
Orchestrator Service Node.js + TypeScript Prepare → Sign → Submit fee-bump ×10 retries
Anchor Platform — SEP Server Java · SDF reference SEP-10/12/24/31/38
AP Business Server Node.js + TypeScript SEP-31 JSON-RPC actions IOF in fee.details[]
KYC / KYB Proxy SEP-12 shim to Idwall · Unico · Truora · Onfido · Sumsub
Stellar RPC + Horizon simulateTx · sendTx · getEvents CAP-33 sponsor-sandwich
Soroban Event Indexer Postgres sink · OSS template bridges RPC 24h → long-term
Card Issuer Adapter Node.js + TypeScript (testnet PoC) ingests auth · capture · refund webhooks → vault.reserve / settle / release invocations (Gnosis Pay hybrid pattern, offchain by necessity)
Postgres (RDS) quote state · partner config event log
Redis quote cache · rate-limit inflight tx dedup
S3 KYC binaries · artifacts audit logs
